title: Echoes of the Past
description: A mod that adds a new item - the Echo Clock - to Minecraft.
body:
# Echoes of the Past ![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1008539448016916717/1011047045735395448/ModFest_Singularity_Banner.png) This mod adds a new item called the Echo Clock to Minecraft. You can store the data of precious mobs - such as your dog or cat - in an echo clock by right-clicking on an entity with the echo clock in your main hand. If that mob dies, then you can summon a perfect copy to take its place! ## Crafting recipe: ![](https://i.imgur.com/Na5PQNa.png)
